---
name: init-website
description: "Use when: setting up the initial website structure for Nails by Izzy. Creates index.html, style.css, and establishes the project foundation."
---

# Initialize Website

Sets up the initial website structure for the Nails by Izzy project.

## Input

- None required - uses project defaults

## Creates

1. **index.html** - Homepage with:
   - Header with business name and navigation
   - Hero section introducing the business
   - Services overview section
   - About section
   - Contact/booking call-to-action
   - Footer with business info

2. **css/style.css** - Main stylesheet with:
   - CSS custom properties for colors
   - Reset/base styles
   - Responsive layout (mobile-first)
   - Component styles following BEM

3. **css/reset.css** - CSS reset for consistency

## Design Specs

- **Primary color**: #E8B4B8 (dusty rose)
- **Secondary**: #D4A5A5 (muted rose)
- **Background**: #FFFEF9 (warm white)
- **Text**: #4A4A4A (dark gray)
- **Font**: Clean sans-serif for body, elegant serif for headings
- **Max width**: 1200px
- **Spacing**: 8px base unit
